results.name: store API smoke + main standings phase helper
league calendars and standings for 2/4/8/16 + odd edge cases
knockout calendars and winner flow for 2/4/8/16 + BYE edge cases
groups+KO logic: RR, Campo 1, firsts opposite, KO excluded from standings
league+KO: playoff results never change league table/default table
own goal affects score/standings/referto label but not scorer table
live exclusion, penalties, preservation, validation edge cases
code regression surface: public team PDF excludes all knockout phases

notes: calculateStandings(state) now defaults to the qualifying table for the current format: league for league/league+KO, group for groups+KO, knockout for KO-only.
Use calculateStandings(state, "all") only for diagnostic all-phase aggregation.
Rows now include wins/draws/losses to keep team phase cards coherent with PG and points.
